params.prompt:
python3 -c "print('='*52)
print(' Prompt Injection Assessment (W02)')
print('='*52)
print('\n[Attacks]')
print(' - Direct (role override) leaks system secret -> INJECTED')
print(' - Extraction (repeat trick) leaks the prompt -> EXTRACTED')
print(' - Extraction ASR measured across 5 techniques')
print('\n[Defenses]')
print(' 1. Hardened system prompt (aligned model resists)')
print(' 2. Input blocklist (catches known, misses variants)')
print(' 3. Output filter (redacts secrets/PII)')
print('\n[Recommendations]')
print(' - Never store secrets in the system prompt')
print(' - Layer all three defenses; measure ASR before/after')
print('='*52)"
